items.title: Can Solana’s strong network demand offset July’s token unlock pressure?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Strong network demand could stabilize SOL's value amid the pressure from token unlocks, influencing investor confidence and market dynamics.

items.title: Solana-based prediction market app on Phantom wallet launches
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of a prediction market app on Phantom wallet enhances Solana's ecosystem, potentially increasing user engagement and transaction volume.

items.title: Mysterious Solana project World unveiled as fully onchain prediction market
items.whyYouShouldCare: The unveiling of a fully on-chain prediction market project adds to Solana's infrastructure, potentially attracting new users and developers to the platform.
